round1: What a WILD start to the playoffs! Round 1 delivered some upsets, with Glenda, Marc, and Nickall showing off their crystal balls on some tricky series. But seriously folks, EVERYONE picked EDM to win and they're GONE – guess we all need new glasses for Round 2!
round2: Alright playoff pool fanatics, Round 2 delivered some serious drama! Jamie, Robin, Marc, and Nathan are celebrating perfect picks, with Robin even nailing that Carolina sweep! But for Benedict and Theodore, picking the Flyers in 4 games only to see them swept was brutal, and several others (looking at you, Jamie, Sophie, Derrick, Glenda, Stephanie, and Robin!) felt the sting of picking a losing team in the *exact* number of games. Ouch, the hockey gods can be cruel!
